mapper.select: /* on.standard.system.systempolicy.inqSystemPolicy */ SELECT PWD_ENC_ALGORITHM pwdEncAlgorithm , PWD_CHG_CYCL_USE_YN pwdChgCycleUseYn , PWD_CHG_CYCL_DD pwdChgCyclDd , LGIN_LMT_USE_YN lginLmtUseYn , LGIN_FAIL_LMT_CNT lginFailLmtCnt , ITSM_USE_YN itsmUseYn , BASE_AUTH_ID baseAuthId , PSSN_PRD_CD pwssPrdCd , ATCH_FILE_SAVE_DIV atchFileSaveDiv , ATCH_FILE_PATH atchFilePath , MA_DIRECT_PAGE maDirectPage , FT_DIRECT_PAGE ftDirectPage FROM STB_B_SYSTEM_POLICY_MNG
